title: Ex Nihilo: Additions
description: Adds support for different mods to Ex Nihilo Sequentia
body:
This addon adds different new content to Ex Nihilo Sequentia from other mods like new barrels, crucibles and sieves, new recipes including missing recipes from vanilla to original mod. (like sifting crushed variant to their pebble form)

Currently supported:
- TFC
- EMI
- Tetra (in beta, please report bugs on github)
- Botania (in beta, please report bugs on github)
- Thermal (in beta, please report bugs on github)

Future Support:
- REI
- tree/stone adding mods

If you have any suggestion which mod should have support with Ex Nihilo Sequentia let me know on Github.
